message:
fix: add GITHUB_TOKEN support to self-update, fix agents --dry-run output

- Add GITHUB_TOKEN/GH_TOKEN env var support to avoid GitHub API rate
  limits during `br upgrade` (#79)
- Fix `br agents --dry-run` to infer and display planned actions when
  no explicit --add/--remove/--update flag is given (#81)
- Confirm #80 (Apple Silicon target triple mapping) was already resolved
  in b687c5a

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
